title: The Viscosity Escape — Does Viscosity Prevent Turing Completeness?

analysis.object: T946: The Viscosity Escape — Does Viscosity Prevent Turing Completeness? depth analysis

viscosity_role.description: Viscosity nu dissipates energy at small scales (Kolmogorov scale eta ~ nu^(3/4)). Large-scale structures persist.
viscosity_role.reason: Viscosity: EML-2 dissipation at small scale

computational_scale.description: Computation in T941/T942 occurs at scale L >> eta. The vortex rings have radii R >> eta. Biot-Savart interactions are at scale R. Viscous dissipation is irrelevant at scale R.
computational_scale.reason: Computation at L >> eta: viscosity irrelevant

kolmogorov_scale_argument.description: The Kolmogorov scale eta = (nu^3/epsilon)^(1/4). At Re = 10^6: eta ~ 10^{-6} L. Computation at scale L/100 is completely unaffected by viscosity.
kolmogorov_scale_argument.reason: Re=10^6: computation at L/100 = eta irrelevant

long_time_issue.description: Long-time issue: viscosity eventually dissipates all vorticity (exponentially in time). But the UTM only needs to run for FINITE time (until it halts). Finite-time Turing completeness suffices.

viscosity_doesnt_escape.description: Conclusion: viscosity does NOT escape the Turing completeness argument. Computation at large scales is unaffected by small-scale dissipation. The UTM runs for finite time before viscosity matters.

inviscid_limit.description: In the inviscid limit (nu -> 0): 3D Euler is certainly Turing-complete (Tao's original framework). NS inherits this for any nu > 0 at high Re.
inviscid_limit.reason: NS inherits Euler Turing-completeness for nu > 0

t946_theorem.description: T946: Viscosity does NOT prevent 3D NS from being Turing-complete. Computation occurs at scales L >> eta (Kolmogorov). Finite-time UTM simulation is unaffected by viscous dissipation. The independence proof T943 holds for NS with viscosity nu > 0. T946.
t946_theorem.reason: Viscosity escape fails: T943 holds for NS with viscosity

analysis.theorem: T946: The Viscosity Escape — Does Viscosity Prevent Turing Completeness? (S1226).

key_theorem: T946: The Viscosity Escape — Does Viscosity Prevent Turing Completeness? (S1226).
